subject: Meeting Request: Project Sync
body:
Hi,

Please join our project sync meeting.

When: February 6, 2025 at 2:00 PM
Where: Conference Room A
Duration: 1 hour

Agenda:
- Review progress
- Discuss blockers
- Plan next steps

Please confirm your attendance.

Best,
Organizer
snippet: Please join our project sync meeting. When: February 6, 2025 at 2:00 PM
